testcase.name: test_19_news
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_regression_final.py:174: in test_19_news assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_73_solutions_crud
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_regression_final.py:691: in test_73_solutions_crud assert create_resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create failed: {create_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"slug":"test-solution-36d8a9c7","title":"TEST Solution","description":"Test description","category":"test","image":"https://example.com/image.jpg","features":["Feature 1","Feature 2"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_76_articles_crud

testcase.name: test_81_catalogues_crud

failure.message:
AssertionError: Update failed: {"detail":"Failed to update catalogue: 3 validation errors for Catalogue
slug
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
category
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
pdf_url
  Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_full_regression_final.py:892: in test_81_catalogues_crud assert update_resp.status_code == 200, f"Update failed: {update_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Update failed: {"detail":"Failed to update catalogue: 3 validation errors for Catalogue
slug
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
category
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing
pdf_url
 Field required [type=missing, input_value={'title': 'TEST Catalogue Updated'}, input_type=dict]
 For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
